item.title: Beyond the GPU: What the AI Infrastructure Buildout Means for the Real Economy
item.description: From compute bottlenecks to industrial consequences.*From compute bottlenecks to industrial consequences — where value may actually concentrate through 2030***Series:** AI Compute Supply Chain | Part
